recommendations.title: Script is a placeholder — no real WSI analysis implemented after four rounds
recommendations.problem: scripts/main.py returns hardcoded mock ROI coordinates regardless of input; no actual image processing occurs. This gap persists across all four audit rounds.
recommendations.root_cause: Script was scaffolded as a stub without implementing OpenSlide or equivalent WSI library integration; not addressed across four rounds.
recommendations.fix: Implement real tissue detection using OpenSlide + Otsu thresholding on thumbnail. Add openslide-python to requirements.txt (already in Prerequisites).

recommendations.title: Path traversal check documented but not implemented in script
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents path traversal enforcement in Workflow Step 3 with Path.resolve(), but the script does not implement this check at runtime.
recommendations.root_cause: Documentation fix applied to SKILL.md but not translated into script logic.
recommendations.fix: Add path validation in main.py: resolved = Path(args.image).resolve(); if not str(resolved).startswith(str(Path.cwd())): print('Path traversal detected', file=sys.stderr); sys.exit(1).

recommendations.title: No --tissue or --species parameter routing in script
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents --type parameter for tissue type filtering but the script does not route based on tissue type for ROI selection.
recommendations.root_cause: Script was scaffolded with a minimal placeholder without implementing tissue-type-specific ROI selection logic.
recommendations.fix: As part of OpenSlide implementation, add tissue-type-specific thresholding parameters for tumor, normal, and stroma tissue types.
